title: Comforting Tunisian Onion Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful Tunisian dish featuring caramelized yellow onions, perfect for a post-workout meal or a comforting dinner
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat
Add the sliced onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until they are caramelized and golden brown
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly
Stir in the ground cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper
Add the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a boil
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes
Stir in the chopped dried apricots and continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro
To cook using a bain-marie, place the saucepan in a larger pot filled with simmering water and cook, covered, for 30 minutes
Cook poultry to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F before serving.
